text: Modified Market Development Assistance (MMDA) Scheme Purpose: Support Khadi and Village Industries (KVI) by rationalizing assistance for market promotion and tech upgrades. Eligibility: Khadi institutions registered with KVIC. Benefits: Financial assistance calculated on Prime Cost, distributed among institutions and artisans. Application: Claims submitted quarterly via Online MDA Processing System of KVIC.

International Cooperation (IC) Scheme Purpose: Promote MSME exports via participation in international trade fairs and exhibitions. Eligibility: Registered MSME Industry Associations, Societies, or Govt organizations (3 years audited accounts). Benefits: Reimbursement of airfare, stall rent, and insurance for approved international events. Application: Online via official IC Scheme portal (https://ic.msme.gov.in/).

Multiplier Grants Scheme (MeitY) Purpose: Encourage joint R&D between industry and academic/R&D institutions in E&IT. Eligibility: Joint proposal from industry and recognized academic/R&D institution (5+ years existence). Benefits: Financial grant-in-aid to support collaborative research and product development. Application: Submit proposals via MeitY website during open calls.

NewGen Innovation and Entrepreneurship Development Centre (NewGen IEDC) Purpose: Foster innovation culture among S&T students in educational institutions. Eligibility: Universities/Colleges offering S&T courses for 5+ years with dedicated space. Benefits: Financial support (up to ₹25 lakhs non-recurring) for 5 years to establish centre and student projects. Application: Proposals submitted to NSTEDB under DST.

Venture Capital Assistance (VCA) Scheme (SFAC) Purpose: Provide financial support to agribusiness projects to meet capital shortfalls. Eligibility: Farmers, Producer Groups, Agripreneurs, and Companies in agriculture/allied sector. Benefits: Interest-free soft loans provided in association with sanctioned bank term loans. Application: Online via SFAC portal (https://sfacindia.com/) after bank appraisal.

Smart India Hackathon (SIH) Purpose: National competition to solve real-world problems for govt and industry through student innovation. Eligibility: Students from recognized Indian colleges/universities (AICTE approved). Benefits: National recognition, cash prizes, mentoring, and startup incubation opportunities. Application: Nominate teams via college SPOC on SIH website (https://www.sih.gov.in/).

National Fellowship for ST Students (NFST) Purpose: Financial assistance for ST students to pursue M.Phil/Ph.D. Eligibility: ST students enrolled in full-time research in recognized institutions. Benefits: Monthly stipend (JRF/SRF), HRA, and contingency grants. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/) or Ministry portal.

Market Intervention Scheme (MIS-PSS) Purpose: Protect farmers of perishable horticultural commodities from distress sales during bumper harvests. Eligibility: Activated on State request when prices fall ≥ 10% below normal. Benefits: Procurement at fixed Market Intervention Price (MIP). Application: Implemented by state agencies; farmers participate via designated state procurement bodies.
